title: Tender Russian Pilaf
description: A flavorful and comforting pilaf dish inspired by Russian cuisine, made with tender beef and fluffy rice.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove beef from skillet and set aside.
Add onion and garlic to skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add pilaf seasoning, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Add beef back into the skillet and stir to combine with the rice mixture.
Add 2 cups of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
